channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Enugu Rangers Win Ninth NPFL Title After Beating Ikorodu City 2-1 on Final Day
item.description: Na so Enugu Rangers don finally clinch their ninth Nigeria Premier Football League title after dem beat Ikorodu City 2-1 for Lagos on the last match day of the season. The Flying Antelopes finish with...

item.title: 2026 Canadian Grand Prix starting grid and championship standings ahead of Montreal race
item.description: The article outlines the starting grid, championship standings, and key context ahead of the 2026 Canadian Grand Prix in Montreal. Despite the original headline referencing Miami, the content focuses ...

item.title: Russia launches large-scale missile and drone assault on Ukraine, including Oreshnik missile
item.description: Russia carried out one of its most extensive aerial assaults on Ukraine since the beginning of the war, launching a massive wave of missiles and drones overnight. According to Ukrainian officials, app...

item.title: Barbie Imperial discusses the key qualities behind her role as Jamilah in “Blood vs Duty”
item.description: ABS-CBN featured actress Barbie Imperial and her portrayal of Jamilah Abubakar in the television drama “Blood vs Duty.” The article highlights three important and inspiring traits that help define Jam...

item.title: White House economic adviser says potential Iran deal could reduce oil prices and ease inflation pressures
item.description: National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett said on Fox News Sunday that there are emerging signs of easing inflation, largely tied to expectations surrounding a potential U.S.-Iran agreement. He...

item.title: Arsenal end Premier League season as champions while West Ham are relegated and Spurs secure survival
item.description: Arsenal rounded off their Premier League title-winning campaign with a confident 2-1 victory over Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park, finishing on 85 points and seven clear of Manchester City. Goals from...

item.title: Tanzania burns over 500kg of heroin after Iranian trafficker receives 30-year prison sentence
item.description: Authorities in Tanzania have destroyed more than 500 kilogrammes of heroin following the sentencing of an Iranian national convicted of international drug trafficking. The destruction exercise was car...

item.title: Scottie Thompson leads Barangay Ginebra to victory over Rain or Shine in PBA matchup
item.description: Barangay Ginebra secured an important win over Rain or Shine in their PBA clash, powered by a strong performance from Scottie Thompson. According to the report by ABS-CBN News, Thompson stepped up off...

item.title: Malaysian higher education delegation to host three-day education expo in Dar es Salaam
item.description: Dar es Salaam is set to host a major international education event from June 1 to June 3, 2026, where a high-level delegation from Malaysia will engage Tanzanian students and education stakeholders. T...

item.title: MAGA physician and Laura Loomer clash over leaked text messages in public dispute
item.description: A public dispute erupted on social media involving Dr. Mary Talley Bowden, a physician aligned with MAGA circles, and far-right activist Laura Loomer. The controversy began when Bowden posted screensh...

item.title: Gwadar University VC, Pro-VC and staff return safely after 10-day disappearance in Balochistan
item.description: The Vice Chancellor and Pro-Vice Chancellor of the University of Gwadar, along with a staff officer and their driver, have safely returned home after remaining missing for around 10 days, according to...

item.title: P.E.I. boy returns home after heart transplant following long recovery in Toronto
item.description: Nine-year-old Maverick Bishop, from Stratford, Prince Edward Island, has returned home after spending nearly 20 months in Toronto awaiting and recovering from a heart transplant. Born with congenital ...

item.title: Global supply chain disruptions linked to Iran conflict impact consumer goods and industry inputs
item.description: The ongoing conflict referred to as the Iran war has begun to affect global supply chains well beyond traditional energy markets, leading to shortages in a range of everyday consumer goods and industr...

item.title: A curated photo collection highlighting Sissy Spacek’s career and film roles during the 1980s
item.description: The article presents a curated collection of photographs featuring American actress and singer Sissy Spacek during the 1980s, a defining decade in her long and successful career. Spacek, born in 1949,...

item.title: Mohamed Esa wins Cape Town Marathon in record-breaking African marathon performance
item.description: Ethiopian marathon runner Mohamed Esa delivered a standout performance at the Sanlam Cape Town Marathon on Sunday, winning the race in a record-breaking time of 2:04:55. His achievement not only secur...

item.title: Chadema assigns Godbless Lema to strengthen party operations in Dodoma, Singida and Morogoro
item.description: Opposition party Chadema has officially appointed former Arusha Urban Member of Parliament, Mr Godbless Lema, to oversee efforts aimed at reviving and strengthening the party in Tanzania’s Central Zon...

item.title: Jack Avery addresses criminal allegations against former partner in alleged murder-for-hire case
item.description: Former Why Don’t We member Jack Avery has publicly responded after his former partner, social media influencer Gabbie Gonzalez, was charged in California in connection with an alleged murder-for-hire ...

item.title: Philippine Military Academy admits 367 new cadets for PMA Class 2030
item.description: The Philippine Military Academy (PMA) formally welcomed 367 new cadets who will compose the PMA Class of 2030 during oath-taking and reception rites held at Borromeo Field in Fort General Gregorio H. ...

item.title: Gabriel Pidomson clinches ADC governorship ticket after Rivers State primary election
item.description: Former Secretary to the Rivers State Government, Gabriel Pidomson, has emerged as the governorship candidate of the African Democratic Congress (ADC) after a keenly contested primary election in River...

item.title: The 1959 Chevrolet El Camino and Its Role in Mid-Century American Automotive Design
item.description: The article examines the 1959 Chevrolet El Camino as an iconic example of late-1950s American automotive design, highlighting its blend of utility and style during a period of strong industrial optimi...
